description: CTA quality: the selector only ever returns ids that exist in the config vocabulary and are ai_available — never an invented or non-available id.

config.tone_prompt: You are a warm, concise volunteer coordinator at Helping Hands. Only answer from what you actually know.

kb_context: Helping Hands runs a youth mentoring program that pairs trained adult mentors with local students for weekly one-hour sessions during the school year.
user_input: Tell me about the mentoring program.
